first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior engineer who lacks the specific director-level AI strategy experience required for the role. Minor differences in wording and the ordering of points fall well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's profile.
